notes: v0.16.66 — Projectile shapes in-game + Boss Rush picker fix + RIFT path mockups. (1) Bullets now render different silhouettes per projectile skin: CHEVRON round, BOLT elongated lozenge with travel-aligned tip, DIAMOND 8-point spinning star, FRAGMENT 3-dot splinter cluster. Applies in-game AND in CLASS LIVE PREVIEW. (2) Boss Rush FIGHT button was calling _start_game() directly which skipped both the pre-match ship picker and the vinyl track roulette. Now routes through the same flow as Practice/Rift. (3) test_rift_paths.tscn ships with 3 redesigned RIFT path-select mockups (BRANCH MAP / COMPARE STRIP / COMPACT CARDS) and a brand-new procedural node icon set (crosshair / skull / tri-skull crown / cross / hex chip / triangle warning / wavy ribbon / arrow ship / ringed boss). User picks one and I'll port it next pass. Windows only.
